CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products change s, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections, or sub -sections have been updated.   The first column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

KEY DEFINITIONS 
Remote Sensing 
Reflectance (RRS) 
The ratio of water -leaving radiance to incident down-welling irradiance just 
above the water surface, measured at specific wavelengths.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for High Resolution Ocean Colour Products, detailing updates and changes to product quality and validation methods.
